---
title: "Variance Random Quotes"
author: "Jonathon Sun"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    theme: united
    embed-resources: true
params:
  talent: "all"
  data_source: "datalake"
  data_root: null
  n_quotes: 5
  context_rows: 10
  num_sheets: 3
  max_quotes_per_video: 1
  seed: 42
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

find_repo_root <- function(start = getwd()) {
  env_root <- trimws(Sys.getenv("TALENT_REPO_ROOT", unset = ""))
  if (nzchar(env_root)) {
    return(normalizePath(env_root, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
  }

  candidate <- normalizePath(start, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
  repeat {
    if (file.exists(file.path(candidate, "AGENTS.md")) &&
        dir.exists(file.path(candidate, "r_scripts"))) {
      return(candidate)
    }

    parent <- dirname(candidate)
    if (identical(parent, candidate)) break
    candidate <- parent
  }

  stop("Could not locate the repository root. Set TALENT_REPO_ROOT.")
}

required_packages <- c("dplyr", "knitr", "purrr", "stringr", "tibble")
missing_packages <- required_packages[
  !vapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)
]
if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Missing required R packages: ",
    paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", "),
    ". Install them in the project renv library before rendering."
  )
}

repo_root <- find_repo_root()
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = repo_root)

source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "utils", "repo_env.R"))
load_repo_env(repo_root)
source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "utils", "datalake_root.r"))
source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "utils", "staging_root.R"))
source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "utils", "talent_select.R"))

resolve_data_root <- function(data_source, data_root = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(data_root) && length(data_root) > 0 &&
      !is.na(data_root[[1]]) && nzchar(trimws(as.character(data_root[[1]])))) {
    return(normalizePath(data_root[[1]], winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
  }

  data_source <- match.arg(tolower(data_source), c("datalake", "staging"))
  root <- if (identical(data_source, "datalake")) {
    get_datalake_root()
  } else {
    get_staging_root()
  }

  normalizePath(root, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
}

load_subtitle_rdata <- function(talent_path) {
  talent_name <- safe_basename(talent_path)
  rdata_dir <- file.path(talent_path, "Subtitles", "RData")
  preferred_path <- file.path(
    rdata_dir,
    sprintf("processed_subtitles_%s.RData", talent_name)
  )

  if (file.exists(preferred_path)) {
    rdata_path <- preferred_path
  } else {
    candidates <- list.files(
      rdata_dir,
      pattern = "\\.[Rr](Data|da)$",
      full.names = TRUE
    )
    if (length(candidates) == 0) {
      warning("No subtitle RData found for ", talent_name, ".")
      return(NULL)
    }

    rdata_path <- candidates[[which.max(file.info(candidates)$mtime)]]
  }

  subtitle_env <- new.env(parent = emptyenv())
  loaded_objects <- load(rdata_path, envir = subtitle_env)
  if (!("dfs" %in% loaded_objects) ||
      !exists("dfs", envir = subtitle_env, inherits = FALSE)) {
    warning("Subtitle RData for ", talent_name, " does not contain `dfs`.")
    return(NULL)
  }

  dfs <- get("dfs", envir = subtitle_env, inherits = FALSE)
  if (!is.list(dfs)) {
    warning("Subtitle `dfs` object for ", talent_name, " is not a list.")
    return(NULL)
  }

  dfs
}

pick_random_quotes_for_talent <- function(talent_name,
                                          dfs,
                                          n_quotes = 5,
                                          context_rows = 10,
                                          num_sheets = 3,
                                          max_quotes_per_video = 1) {
  if (length(dfs) == 0 || n_quotes < 1) return(tibble::tibble())

  valid_sheets <- names(dfs)[vapply(dfs, function(df) {
    is.data.frame(df) && nrow(df) > 0 &&
      all(c("VideoID", "VideoTitle", "Text") %in% names(df))
  }, logical(1))]
  if (length(valid_sheets) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())

  target_sheets <- sample(
    valid_sheets,
    size = min(num_sheets, length(valid_sheets)),
    replace = FALSE
  )
  stacked <- purrr::map_dfr(target_sheets, function(sheet_name) {
    dplyr::mutate(dfs[[sheet_name]], sheet = sheet_name)
  })
  stacked <- dplyr::filter(stacked, !is.na(.data$VideoID))
  if (nrow(stacked) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())

  sampled_videos <- sample(unique(stacked$VideoID), replace = FALSE)
  quote_plan <- purrr::map_dfr(sampled_videos, function(video_id) {
    df_video <- dplyr::filter(stacked, .data$VideoID == .env$video_id)
    if ("start_sec" %in% names(df_video)) {
      df_video <- dplyr::arrange(df_video, .data$start_sec)
    }

    n_take <- min(max_quotes_per_video, nrow(df_video))
    tibble::tibble(
      video_id = video_id,
      selected_row = sample(seq_len(nrow(df_video)), size = n_take)
    )
  }) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n_quotes) |>
    dplyr::mutate(quote_num = dplyr::row_number())

  purrr::pmap_dfr(quote_plan, function(video_id, selected_row, quote_num) {
    df_video <- dplyr::filter(stacked, .data$VideoID == .env$video_id)
    if ("start_sec" %in% names(df_video)) {
      df_video <- dplyr::arrange(df_video, .data$start_sec)
    }
    start_row <- max(selected_row - context_rows, 1)

    df_video[start_row:selected_row, , drop = FALSE] |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        talent = talent_name,
        selected_row = selected_row,
        quote_num = quote_num,
        context_line = dplyr::row_number()
      )
  })
}

validate_count_param <- function(value, name, minimum) {
  value <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(value))
  if (length(value) != 1 || is.na(value) || value < minimum) {
    stop("`", name, "` must be an integer greater than or equal to ", minimum, ".")
  }
  value
}

data_root <- resolve_data_root(params$data_source, params$data_root)
talent_paths <- select_talent(params$talent, root = data_root)
talent_names <- safe_basename(talent_paths)

n_quotes <- validate_count_param(params$n_quotes, "n_quotes", 1)
context_rows <- validate_count_param(params$context_rows, "context_rows", 0)
num_sheets <- validate_count_param(params$num_sheets, "num_sheets", 1)
max_quotes_per_video <- validate_count_param(
  params$max_quotes_per_video,
  "max_quotes_per_video",
  1
)
seed <- validate_count_param(params$seed, "seed", 0)

subtitle_rdata <- purrr::map(talent_paths, load_subtitle_rdata)
names(subtitle_rdata) <- talent_names
subtitle_rdata <- purrr::compact(subtitle_rdata)
if (length(subtitle_rdata) == 0) {
  stop("No subtitle RData was available for the selected talent(s).")
}

set.seed(seed)
random_quote_lines <- purrr::imap_dfr(
  subtitle_rdata,
  ~ pick_random_quotes_for_talent(
    talent_name = .y,
    dfs = .x,
    n_quotes = n_quotes,
    context_rows = context_rows,
    num_sheets = num_sheets,
    max_quotes_per_video = max_quotes_per_video
  )
)

if (nrow(random_quote_lines) == 0) {
  stop("No quotes could be sampled from the selected subtitle data.")
}

quote_summary <- random_quote_lines |>
  dplyr::group_by(
    .data$talent,
    .data$quote_num,
    .data$VideoID,
    .data$VideoTitle,
    .data$sheet
  ) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    quote = stringr::str_squish(paste(.data$Text, collapse = " ")),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$talent, .data$quote_num)
```

This report samples up to **`r n_quotes`** quotes per talent from **`r num_sheets`** randomly selected subtitle files. Each quote includes up to **`r context_rows`** preceding subtitle lines. Sampling is reproducible with seed **`r seed`**.

# Sampled Quotes

```{r}
#| label: sampled-quotes
#| results: asis

for (talent_name in unique(quote_summary$talent)) {
  talent_quotes <- dplyr::filter(quote_summary, .data$talent == talent_name)
  cat("\n## ", talent_name, "\n\n", sep = "")

  for (row_index in seq_len(nrow(talent_quotes))) {
    quote_row <- talent_quotes[row_index, , drop = FALSE]
    cat("### Quote ", quote_row$quote_num, "\n\n", sep = "")
    cat("**Video:** ", quote_row$VideoTitle, "  \n", sep = "")
    cat("**Video ID:** `", quote_row$VideoID, "`  \n", sep = "")
    cat("**Subtitle file:** `", quote_row$sheet, "`\n\n", sep = "")
    cat("> ", quote_row$quote, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }
}
```

# Quote Index

```{r}
#| label: quote-index

quote_summary |>
  dplyr::select(
    Talent = "talent",
    Quote = "quote_num",
    Video = "VideoTitle",
    `Video ID` = "VideoID",
    `Subtitle file` = "sheet"
  ) |>
  knitr::kable()
```
